texto: I went to art school in Chicago for a year at Columbia College. I had this whole master plan of getting into sustainable development and green architecture and construction, so I wanted to go to business school and then get my masters in construction and development.
explicacao: Orientação direta de Nico Tortorella sobre temas ligados a educacao. A afirmação “I went to art school in Chicago for a year at Columbia College. I had this whole master plan of g…” funciona como lembrete prático ligado a educacao, business, art, útil em momentos de art e school.

frase_original: I went to art school in Chicago for a year at Columbia College. I had this whole master plan of getting into sustainable development and green architecture and construction, so I wanted to go to business school and then get my masters in construction and development.
